Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Internet line which was ripped apart by the Shadow earlier this month will be fixed tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you have a computer in your room, you should be able to connect.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So that takes care of everything that was damaged...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2075 0 0}You know, those games you play online with a buncha people ya never met before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I used to be totally addicted to this one game, but I kinda got burned out on it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Here, you can have it. It's called Innocent Sin Online.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, you gotta check this one out. It's called Innocent Sin Online.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}I used to be totally addicted to it, but I got kinda burned out... Maybe you'll get a kick out of it.[n]{f 1 1}
